seo.title: Trading Stock Indices Amid US-Iran Conflict
seo.description: Geopolitical conflicts can trigger sharp volatility across global stock markets, driving risk-off sentiment and rapid price swings. This article explores how events like the Middle East crisis impact indices, trader behavior, and outlines key strategies to navigate high-uncertainty environments.

title: Fear and Volatility: Trading Stock Indices Amid US-Iran Conflict
author: Blackwell Research Team
